procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1125
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1125 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

osquery.name: t1125_file_access
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;
